arguments.name: There are no input arguments for this command.

outputs.description: The record id Vectra.Rule.SmartCategory Custom Triage label used to recategorize specified detections
outputs.name: Vectra.Rule.ID

outputs.description: Name of Triage filter Vectra.Rule.Type Original detection type
outputs.name: Vectra.Rule.Description

outputs.description: Original detection category Vectra.Rule.Created The timestamp when this Triage filter was created
outputs.name: Vectra.Rule.Category

outputs.description: The timestamp when this Triage filter was triggered Vectra.Rule.Host.ID Host(s) that this Triage filter applies to
outputs.name: Vectra.Rule.LastUpdate

outputs.description: Host IP Vectra.Rule.Priority Used in ordering execution of Triage filters
outputs.name: Vectra.Rule.IP

outputs.description: Destination IP where this Triage filter will be applied to Vectra.Rule.Remote.Protocol Destination protocol where this Triage filter will be applied to
outputs.name: Vectra.Rule.Remote.IP

outputs.description: Destination port where this Triage filter will be applied to Vectra.Rule.Remote.DNS Destination FQDN where this Triage filter will apply to
outputs.name: Vectra.Rule.Remote.Port
